description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a tan polymer lower receiver and a black pistol grip, featuring a modular design. The rifle has a long, metallic barrel with a flash hider at the muzzle and a prominent handguard with a rail system for mounting accessories. The upper receiver is equipped with flip-up iron sights and a full-length Picatinny rail, allowing for the attachment of optics or other tactical devices. The magazine is a detachable box type, partially visible and integrated into the lower receiver. The stock is a fixed, ergonomic design, providing stability and comfort for the user. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, typical of contemporary military or law enforcement rifles.
description: A modern tan and black tactical rifle with a long barrel, fixed stock, flip-up iron sights, and a detachable box magazine. It features a modular rail system and robust construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel's end, flash hider, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the tan polymer body, fixed stock, pistol grip, and the full-length rail system.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock, pistol grip, and the upper receiver's rail alignment.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, magazine well, and the details of the handguard and barrel.
